query: What files does the DALYREJS JCL handle?

results.name: DALYREJS Header
0300-DALYREJS-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 0300-DALYREJS-OPEN (lines 291-308)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0300-DALYREJS-OPEN in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0300-DALYREJS-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN OUTPUT DALYREJS-FILE                                            
           IF  DALYREJS-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING DALY REJECTS FILE'                        
               MOVE DALYREJS-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

9300-DALYREJS-CLOSE

results.summary: paragraph 9300-DALYREJS-CLOSE in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9300-DALYREJS-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE DALYREJS-FILE                                                  
           IF  DALYREJS-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING DAILY REJECTS FILE'                       
               MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN01C.cbl
Program: CBTRN01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN (lines 252-270)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
Calls: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.summary: paragraph 0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-DALYTRAN-OPEN.
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.
           OPEN INPUT DALYTRAN-FILE
           IF  DALYTRAN-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING DAILY TRANSACTION FILE'
               MOVE DALYTRAN-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.

      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 2500-WRITE-REJECT-REC
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 2500-WRITE-REJECT-REC (lines 446-466)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 2500-WRITE-REJECT-REC in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.
results.content:
2500-WRITE-REJECT-REC.                                                   
           MOVE DALYTRAN-RECORD TO REJECT-TRAN-DATA                             
           MOVE WS-VALIDATION-TRAILER TO VALIDATION-TRAILER                     
      *     DISPLAY '***' REJECT-RECORD                                         
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT                                                
           WRITE FD-REJS-RECORD FROM REJECT-RECORD                              
           IF DALYREJS-STATUS = '00'                                            
               MOVE 0 TO  APPL-RESULT                                           
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR WRITING TO REJECTS FILE'                          
               MOVE DALYREJS-STATUS  TO IO-STATUS                               
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

DATA DIVISION.

       01  FD-TRANFILE-REC.

           05 FD-ACCT-ID                        PIC 9(11).                      
           05 FD-ACCT-DATA                      PIC X(289).

              10 FD-TRANCAT-ACCT-ID             PIC 9(11).                      
              10 FD-TRANCAT-TYPE-CD             PIC X(02).                      
              10 FD-TRANCAT-CD                  PIC 9(04).                      
           05 FD-FD-TRAN-CAT-DATA               PIC X(33).

       01  DALYTRAN-STATUS.                                                     
           05  DALYTRAN-STAT1      PIC X.                                       
           05  DALYTRAN-STAT2      PIC X.

       01  TCATBALF-STATUS.

           05  TCATBALF-STAT2      PIC X.                                       
                                                                                
       01  IO-STATUS.

           05  IO-STAT2            PIC X.

           05  TWO-BYTES-LEFT      PIC X.                                       
           05  TWO-BYTES-RIGHT     PIC X.

           05  IO-STATUS-0403      PIC 999 VALUE 0.

       01  ABCODE                  PIC S9(9) BINARY.

      * T I M E S T A M P   D B 2  X(26)     EEEE-MM-DD-UU.MM.SS.HH0000
